parityMeta.describes: iOS-17e-3 progressionRulesEngine parity — backoff (volume drop). A compound templateExercise (repMin 6 / repMax 8 / sets 3 / startWeight 60 / progressionUnitKg 2.5) whose newest session volume (3x6 @ 60 = 1080) falls below 90% of the previous session (3x8 @ 60 = 1440) drives shouldBackoff via `dropped`: nextWeight = max(unit, lastWeight - increment) = 57.5, reps = repMin, note '最近表现回落'. shouldUseTopBackoff true; buildSetPrescription emits the top+backoff prescription. FUNCTION-LEVEL compute-assert on the Swift side.
parityMeta.sourceNotes: deterministicClockIso anchored in the PAST => live fineTune window empty (golden-neutral). Sessions NEWEST-FIRST: newest lower-volume than previous => dropped => backoff.
